HyprSpaceOS

Smooth. Sharp. Spacious.

An elegant Arch Linux experience powered by Hyprland. Minimalist by design, limitless by choice.

Download Now Explore Features

Built Different

Every detail crafted for performance and beauty. No compromise.

Blazing Fast

Arch Linux base with Hyprland's lightweight compositor. Boot times under 5 seconds.

Stunning Visuals

Glassmorphism, smooth animations, blur effects, and vibrant gradients out of the box.

Your Way

Full control over every pixel. Choose from editions or build your own from scratch.
